select.isEqual: SELECT tbContainer.ContainerID , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName2 , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID FROM tbContainer JOIN tbContainerType ON tbContainer.tenant_id = tbContainerType.tenant_id AND tbContainer.ContainerTypeID = tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID JOIN tbContainerUseDep ON tbContainer.tenant_id = tbContainerUseDep.tenant_id AND tbContainer.ContainerID = tbContainerUseDep.ContainerID WHERE tbContainer.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND tbContainerUseDep.UseDepID = #myDeptID# AND tbContainer.ContainerOwnDepID = #useDeptID# ORDER BY tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID

SELECT tbContainer.ContainerID , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName2 , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID , tbContainer.ContainerOwnDepID FROM tbContainer JOIN tbContainerType ON tbContainer.tenant_id = tbContainerType.tenant_id AND tbContainer.ContainerTypeID = tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID JOIN tbContainerUseDep ON tbContainer.tenant_id = tbContainerUseDep.tenant_id AND tbContainer.ContainerID = tbContainerUseDep.ContainerID WHERE tbContainer.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND tbContainerUseDep.UseDepID = #myDeptID# AND tbContainer.ContainerOwnDepID <> #myDeptID# ORDER BY tbContainer.ContainerOwnDepID, tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID

sqlMap.select: SELECT tbContainer.ContainerID , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName2 , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID FROM tbContainer , tbContainerType WHERE tbContainer.tenant_id = tbContainerType.tenant_id AND tbContainer.ContainerTypeID = tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID AND tbContainer.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND tbContainer.ContainerOwnDepID = #myDeptID# ORDER BY tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID

SELECT TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ItemCode ,
TBDOCNUM_ITEM.itemname itemname
TBDOCNUM_ITEM.itemname itemname2
FROM TBENDAPRDOCINFO JOIN TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID JOIN tbContainer ON TBENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id = tbContainer.tenant_id AND TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ContainerID = tbContainer.ContainerID JOIN TBDOCNUM_ITEM ON TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBDOCNUM_ITEM.tenant_id AND TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ItemCode = TBDOCNUM_ITEM.itemcode WHERE TBENDAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DelFlag IS NULL AND ( TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ItemCode IS NOT NULL ) AND ( TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ItemCode <> '' ) AND ( TBENDAPRDOCINFO.ContainerID IN ( SELECT tbContainer.ContainerID FROM tbContainer LEFT JOIN tbContainerUseDep ON tbContainer.tenant_id = tbContainerUseDep.tenant_id AND tbContainer.ContainerID = tbContainerUseDep.ContainerID WHERE tbContainer.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND ( tbContainer.ContainerOwnDepID = #deptID# ) OR ( tbContainerUseDep.UseDepID = #deptID# ) ) )
GROUP BY TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ItemCode, TBDOCNUM_ITEM.itemname
GROUP BY TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ItemCode, TBDOCNUM_ITEM.itemname2
ORDER BY TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.ItemCode
SELECT NAME$lang$ AS NAME FROM TBCODELIST WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND CODE1 = #code1# AND CODE2 = #code2#
SELECT USERCONTID , USERCONTNAME , DESCRIPTION FROM TBUSERCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PARENTCONTID = #parentContID# AND OWNUSERID = #userID# ORDER BY USERCONTNAME
SELECT DEPTCONTID , DEPTCONTNAME , DESCRIPTION , SN , MANAGEUSERID FROM TBDEPTCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PARENTCONTID = #parentContID# AND OWNDEPTID = #deptID# ORDER BY SN, DEPTCONTNAME
SELECT count(*) FROM TBUSERCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PARENTCONTID = #userID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBDEPTCONT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PARENTCONTID = #deptContID#

SELECT CONTAINERID FROM TBCONTAINER INNER JOIN TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE ON TBCONTAINER.TENANT_ID = TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.TENANT_ID AND TBCONTAINER.CONTAINERTYPEID = TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.CONTAINERTYPEID WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.DOCUMENTSTATE IN (#staDSPumYui#, #staDSBalSin#) AND CONTAINEROWNDEPID = #deptID#

SELECT CONTAINERID FROM tbContainer JOIN TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE ON tbContainer.tenant_id = TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.tenant_id AND tbContainer.ContainerTypeID = TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.ContainerTypeID WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.DocumentState = #staDSBansong# AND CONTAINEROWNDEPID = #deptID#
SELECT DEPTID , CONTTYPE , SN , CONTNAME , SUBQUERY FROM TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEPTID = #deptID# ORDER BY CONTTYPE, SN
SELECT CODE, NAME1 AS NAME FROM TBCODEDOCTYPE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ISUSE = '1' ORDER BY CODE
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(usercontid), '0000000000') + 1 FROM TBUSERCONT WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
INSERT INTO TBUSERCONT ( USERCONTID, USERCONTNAME, PARENTCONTID, DESCRIPTION, OWNUSERID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #maxContainerID#, #userContName#, #parentContID#, #description#, #userID#, #tenantID# )

SELECT NVL(MAX(deptcontid), '0000000000') + 1 FROM TBDEPTCONT WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
INSERT INTO TBDEPTCONT ( DEPTCONTID, DEPTCONTNAME, PARENTCONTID, SN, DESCRIPTION, OWNDEPTID, MANAGEUSERID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #maxContainerID#, #deptContName#, #parentContID#, #sn#, #description#, #deptID#, #manageUserID#, #tenantID# )
